General.Name: Confidence Intelligence Holding Ltd
General.Description: Confidence Intelligence Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides electronic manufacturing services in the People's Republic of China, Malaysia, and the United States. The company offers assembling and production services of printed circuit board assembly (PCBAs) that integrate research, designing, selection, and procurement of raw materials, assembling of PCBAs, quality control, testing, logistics, and aftersales services. Its products are used in electronic end products for telecommunication devices, IoT products, and automotive related devices. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.
